allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('lockfileVersion check - package.json version:', d.get\('version','N/A'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { z } = require\('zod'\); const s = z.coerce.number\(\).positive\(\).optional\(\); const r = s.safeParse\(''\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\); const r2 = s.safeParse\('5000'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r2\)\); const r3 = s.safeParse\(undefined\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r3\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...pkg.dependencies, ...pkg.devDependencies}; ['expo-image-picker','expo-haptics','expo-file-system','react-native-sse'].forEach\(p => console.log\(p, deps[p] || 'NOT INSTALLED'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...pkg.dependencies, ...pkg.devDependencies}; Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => k.startsWith\('expo'\)\).sort\(\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k, deps[k]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('image-picker:', pkg.dependencies['expo-image-picker']\); console.log\('haptics:', pkg.dependencies['expo-haptics']\)")
